Yanmar · Engine

Yanmar 6EY18(A)LW (Confirmed OEM)

Confirmed OEM spare parts for the Yanmar 6EY18(A)LW marine diesel (180×280 mm bore × stroke, 400–800 kW). Sources: PartfinderMarine, Yanmar specification PDF.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
CYLINDER HEAD 2
Part NumberDescription
746621-11100CCylinder Cover Complete – c/w inlet+exhaust valve seat, valve, guide, springs (alt: 746623-11100C)
746673-15104Indicator Cock Assembly (alt: 746673-15104-S)
FUEL INJECTION 1
Part NumberDescription
746623-51101Fuel Injection Pump Complete (per cylinder)
GASKETS & SEALS 2
Part NumberDescription
746623-35450Paper Insert (air cooler / manifold joint)
746623-35460O-Ring Seal Kit (cylinder head / general engine)
ONBOARD TOOLS 8
Part NumberDescription
28110100130Double Ended Spanner 10×13
28110170190Double Ended Spanner 17×19
28110220240Double Ended Spanner 22×24
28110270300Double Ended Spanner 27×30
28110320360Double Ended Spanner 32×36
28110410460Double Ended Spanner 41×46
28160170190Offset Wrench 17×19
4867392270Single Ended Spanner for FI Valve Adjustment

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
